texto: Who am I? I am not nothing but this moment in the flow of life. This flow of life is not in my control
autor: it is the life of the universe itself. The life of the universe flows in me and I just flow with this life and that is myself.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de it is the life of the universe itself. The life of the universe flows in me and I just flow with this life and that is myself. que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Who am I? I am not nothing but this moment in the flow of life. This flow of life is not in my co…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, kiyozawa-manshi, nothing, com foco em reflexao.
